name: eyebrow
label: Eyebrow label
help_text: Small caps label above the heading. Use 'Foundation' for the first layer, 'Detail 1'/'Detail 2'/etc. for subsequent ones.

name: heading
label: Heading
help_text: The layer's title — appears as H2.

name: body_text
label: Body text
default: The Mark is composed of 10 interconnected shapes. This is intentional. These 10 shapes reference the 10 beads of a Rosary decade.
help_text: Multi-paragraph description of this layer's meaning. Use <em> for inline emphasis.

name: image_url
label: Visualization image
help_text: The visual that illustrates this layer. Will be auto-sized.

name: image_position
label: Image position
help_text: Layers typically alternate left/right for visual rhythm.

name: image_background
label: Image background
help_text: Choose dark only if the symbol image is white-on-transparent.
